title: Checkered Beds
description: Updated the vanilla beds to have a more cottage core esthetic. Checkered Pattern with flowers on the side and vines around the base.
body: # Swollsy's Checkered Beds Updated the vanilla beds to have a more cottage core esthetic. Checkered Pattern with flowers on the side and vines around the base. Hope you like it, Feed back is always appreciated. ![checkered beds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5217d62138a515c11f5ea68c558ad1e8477cf8ea.png)
